description: A legacy appointment system has exported a list of future appointments to ~/Documents/legacy_appointments.csv. Reconcile this list against the MedinTux patient database 'DrTuxTest' (user: root, no password) by matching LastName and FirstName in the IndexNomPrenom table. Export unique matches to ~/Documents/ready_import.csv with columns GUID, Date_ISO (converted from DD/MM/YYYY to YYYY-MM-DD), Time, and Reason. Export rows that could not be automatically matched (patient not found or multiple patients found) to ~/Documents/review_required.csv with columns Date, Time, LastName, FirstName, Reason, and Error_Type.
